title: Implement Wave 34 provider profile scorecard UI and select-from-profile flow
description: Update the manager provider directory/profile flow so assignment-context navigation loads queue-aware provider scorecard data and allows provider selection directly from the provider profile screen.
acceptance_criteria: Provider profile renders assignment_fit scorecard when opened from assignment selection context
Manager can select a provider directly from the provider profile screen
Generic provider directory browsing remains unchanged when no selection context is present
